whyItMatters: Claude Code creator, Boris Cherny: "A year ago, I prompted Claude to write code. Now I don't prompt Claude anymore. I have loops that are running. They're the ones prompting Claude. My job is to write loops." in 30 minutes, Boris explains exactly what that next abstraction layer looks like - and why it's coming for everyone, not just engineers -why he unins…
